title: Nissl (Cresyl Violet) staining
steps: Dehydrate sections – 10 dips in each: 50, 70, 80, 90, 100, 100, and 100% ethanol
Rehydrate sections – 10 dips in each: 100, 100, 100, 90, 80, 70, and 50% ethanol
Leave sections in Cresyl Violet for 3min on shake
Leave sections in Citric Acid for 1min
Leave sections in Cresyl Violet for 2min on shaker
Dehydrate sections – 10 dips in each: 50, 70, 80, 90, 100, 100, and 100% ethanol
Leave in Xylene for at least 5min
creator: Christiana.bjorkli
